programs.title: Mayfair Witches
programs.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

programs.title: Mayfair Witches
programs.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

programs.title: Mayfair Witches
programs.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: In Madison, Satu, Knox and Gerbert arrive at the Bishop house to find that Matthew and Diana have disappeared; Matthew and Diana arrive in Elizabethan London and are confronted by a face from Matthew's past.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: As she continues her search for a mentor, Diana meets wealthy alchemist Mary Sidney; London's vampire ruler demands fealty from Diana and Matthew as he is unnerved by their sudden arrival in the City.

programs.title: A Discovery of Witches
programs.desc: In the present day, Domenico finds a body in Oxford; Em practices higher magic to reach Diana's mother; in 1590, Matthew and Diana explore John Dee's library in search of the Book of Life; they later meet with Queen Elizabeth.
